LAW AND MOTION 301, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION WAS ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON NOVEMBER 6, 2003: RULING: THE MOTION FOR A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO TERMS AND CONDITIONS SET FORTH IN THE COURT'S ORDER; AS A FURTHER CONDITION OF THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION, PLAINTIFF SHALL POST A BOND IN THE SUM OF $250,000.00. THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION SHALL REMAIN IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT PENDING WRITTEN ADOPTION, MODIFICATION OR DISSOLUTION BY AN ARBITRATOR SELECTED PURSUANT TO SECTION 9.3 OF THE OPERATING AGREEMENT; IT SHALL REPLACE IN ALL RESPECTS THE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER DATED 09/20/03. (301/JLW)

MOTION Notice To Be Relived As Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-09-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFF 850 MONTGOMERY LLC'S Motion To Be Relived As Counsel: OFF CALENDAR; entire action dismissed without prejudice on 01/23/04. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-09-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Geoffrey Gordon-Creed, Esq. of GORDON-CREED, KELLY 421-3100, for plaintiff 850 Montgomery LLC, moving for order to show cause re: preliminary injunction
Eric Whitaker, Esq., 771-6174, for defendants John Bauer, Neil Rideout, Matt Kahn, and Bradley Carroll, opposing the motion

RULING:
The Court heard argument in plaintiff's Order to show cause re: preliminary injunction and took the matter under submission. Court will issue its form of preliminary injuction. The Court ordered the followings: 1) Parties to submit briefs re: the bond issue, on or before 11/13. 2) TRO will remains in effect -- violation of the operating agreement will be a vilation of the Court order. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-30-2003 Continued To Nov-06-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Geoffrey Gordon-Creed, Esq. of GORDON-CREED, KELLY 421-3100, for plaintiff 850 Montgomery LLC, moving for an Order to show cause re: Preliminary injunction
Eric Whitaker, Esq., 771-6174, for defendants and opposing party

RULING:
Counsel presented a signed stipulation for continuance of the hearing. The Court CONTINUED the hearing on order to show cause re: Preliminary injunction to November 6, 2003. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
